creator: a134qaed@gmail.com
text:
Loader prints a 'Error: Stack underflow' after the copyright splash, and
then bails out early with BIOS device 0xFFFFFFFF not found. It happened
immediately after a freebsd-update -r 7.1-BETA, and is too early in the
boot process to recover from without manual intervention. I'm going to
get a 7.0-RELEASE loader back on the machine, and try building a firewire
loader to trap the full output.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: Most likely board related, I'll get a basic dmesg once I've been able to
boot up something useful.
